definition: 形容某人或某物不好看、不吸引人、糟糕的状态
dialog:
A: Hey, did you see Jake's new haircut?
B: Yeah, bro is totally chopped. 💀
A: He should've gone to a better barber.
examples: That haircut got you looking so chopped.
I can't lie, that outfit is chopped.
Nah, he's chopped. Not my type.
My brain is fully chopped after that exam.
